org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanInstantiator.Builder

Packages that use BeanInstantiator.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API

  • Uses of BeanInstantiator.Builder in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject that return BeanInstantiator.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T2> BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.addBean(Class<T2> type, T2 bean)
    Adds a bean to the internal bean store.
    <T2> BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.addBean(Class<T2> type, T2 bean, String name)
    Adds a named bean to the internal bean store.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.autoWireBuilder()
    Enables auto-wiring of bean store entries into matching setter methods on the builder.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.builder(Class<?> value)
    Specifies the builder type to use for creating the bean.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.builder(Object value)
    Specifies an existing builder instance to use for creating the bean.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.builderClassNames(String... names)
    Specifies custom class names to look for when auto-detecting builder inner classes.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.builderInitializer(Consumer<Object> initializer)
    Registers a callback that is invoked on the builder instance before build() is called.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.builderMethodNames(String... names)
    Specifies custom method names to look for when auto-detecting builder factory methods.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.buildMethodNames(String... names)
    Specifies custom method names to look for when calling build methods on builder instances.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.cached()
    Enables caching mode.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.copy()
    Returns a copy of this builder with the same configuration.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.debug()
    Enables debug mode to track the bean creation process.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.description(String value)
    Sets a human-readable description used in log entries and error messages.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.factoryAbstainOnNull()
    Treat a null return value from a static factory method as a deliberate "abstain" signal.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.factoryMethodNames(String... names)
    Specifies custom static factory method names to look for when creating the bean.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.fallback(Supplier<? extends T> fallback)
    Specifies a fallback supplier to use if bean creation fails.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.impl(T value)
    Specifies an existing bean implementation to use instead of creating a new instance.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.injectBuilder()
    Enables @Inject / @Autowired field and method injection on the builder instance.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.noBuilder()
    Disables builder-based bean creation entirely.
    static <T> BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.of(Class<T> beanType)
    Creates a new bean creator builder.
    static <T> BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.of(Class<T> beanType, BeanStore parentStore)
    Creates a new bean creator builder with a parent bean store.
    static <T> BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.of(Class<T> beanType, BeanStore parentStore, String name, Object enclosingInstance)
    Creates a new bean creator builder with a parent bean store, name, and enclosing instance.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.or(BeanInstantiator.Builder<? extends T> alternative)
    Registers an alternative BeanInstantiator.Builder to consult if this builder fails to create the bean.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.postCreateHook(Consumer<T> hook)
    Registers a post-creation hook to run after the bean is created.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.preferZeroArgConstructor()
    Prefer a zero-argument constructor when one exists, instead of injecting via the longest constructor.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.reset()
    Resets the builder, builderType, and beanImpl suppliers.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.scope(BeanInstantiator.Scope value)
    Sets the lifecycle scope of the bean being created.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.silent()
    Suppresses warning-level log output from this builder.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.type(Class<? extends T> value)
    Specifies a subclass of the bean type to create.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.type(ClassInfo value)
    Specifies a subclass of the bean type to create, via a ClassInfo reference.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.validate(Predicate<T> predicate, String message)
    Registers a post-creation validator.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.wrap(UnaryOperator<T> wrapper)
    Registers a transformation to apply to the created bean before it is returned.

    Method
    Description

    RestClient.Builder.callHandler()
